mdRecord.dcterms:title: Little River Swinging Bridge
mdRecord.dcterms:description: 1349_N_Swing Bridge 049 Carnice Mannon, Nancy Hall, Irene Smith WOODEN SWINGING BRIDGE" Once a common sight, footbridges created pedestrian access to many homes in Floyd County. This swinging bridge crossed over the Little River near the Spangler Mill. Image from the Nancy Hall Collection
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
